name: topview-ai
description: Use TopView AI from Codex to research content, write Seedance prompts, generate media, and publish videos to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

interface.shortDescription: Research content, generate media, and publish videos.
interface.longDescription: TopView AI lets Codex research public web and social content, plan, create, and distribute marketing media: collect structured sources, creator lists, comments, trend signals, competitor content, and prompts; write Seedance 2.0 video prompts and storyboards; generate videos, images, talking avatars, product model shots, background removal, and voice outputs; then upload finished videos to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube through the local social-upload workflow.
defaultPrompt: Collect competitor content ideas from YouTube and Reddit.
